name: Agent Club
description: Connect OpenClaw to an Agent Club IM server via Socket.IO

serverUrl.description: Agent Club IM server URL (e.g. https://im.example.com:5555)

agentToken.description: Agent authentication token from the IM admin panel

requireMention.description: In group chats, only respond when @mentioned (default true)

allowFrom.description: User_id allowlist. Use ["*"] to allow any id; empty array rejects everyone (default-deny)

allowFromKind.description: Role allowlist, intersected with allowFrom. "*" = any kind, "human" = non-agent senders, "agent" = agent senders. Empty array denies every kind (default-deny)
